User_quote_or_paraphrase: Form 16 salary is correct but AIS shows extra interest/dividend - what do I do? Will a mismatch trigger 143(1) or delay my refund?
Why_it_hurts: CPC auto-compares filed ITR vs AIS; mismatch triggers 143(1)(a) intimation and refund delay. Most DIY filers do not know AIS exists.
Gap: Three-doc model not shown side-by-side anywhere as one reconcile view
Phase_2_UI_action: /file/review reconcile dashboard: Form 16 vs AIS vs 26AS with matched/needs-attention states; let users file with correct figures + log AIS feedback

User_quote_or_paraphrase: How are intraday and F&O profits taxed? F&O turnover and audit threshold? STCG/LTCG discrepancy and rebate under new regime?
Why_it_hurts: Form selection (ITR-2 vs ITR-3), turnover math, and 111A/112A special rates are genuinely hard; where users most fear notices.
Gap: CG data entry is estimate-placeholder only
Phase_2_UI_action: Review screen states 'capital gains detected -> ITR-2/3, here is what the portal needs'; honest 'complex -> consider expert'; CG as first-class income head

User_quote_or_paraphrase: Can I claim home-office expenses? Freelancer with foreign clients - how to report, is GST needed? High income low tax under 44ADA?
Why_it_hurts: Presumptive eligibility, 50% deemed profit, advance tax, GST thresholds confusing; foreign receipts add FEMA/GST nuance.
Gap: Path exists but thin on guidance
Phase_2_UI_action: Clear presumptive explainer + honest 'foreign income/GST -> consider expert'; covered mostly via learn/help

User_quote_or_paraphrase: New Regime FY25-26: calculation discrepancy on STCG/LTCG tax & 87A rebate eligibility. Old vs new - which is better for me?
Why_it_hurts: 87A rebate does not apply to special-rate income (111A/112A); the interaction surprises people. Regime choice is highest-leverage for salaried.
Our_route_today: /file/regime compare; RegimeCompareCard on landing; engine computes both regimes
Phase_2_UI_action: Reconcile dashboard surfaces regime recommendation inline with honest estimate disclaimer and the 'why' (deductions lost in new, breakeven)

Theme: Gifts, HUF, and 'do I report this?'
User_quote_or_paraphrase: Is a gift > Rs 50,000 from wife's parents tax-free in my HUF? Do I report gifts from parents? How are gifted shares/gold/property taxed?
Why_it_hurts: Relative-vs-non-relative exemption, HUF treatment, reporting obligations are murky; under-reporting risk is real.
Phase_2_UI_action: Covered via Phase 1 learn/help + glossary; no Phase 2 UI blocker

User_quote_or_paraphrase: TDS on property purchased from an NRI seller (195 vs 194-IA). NRI reporting of Indian let-out property and interest.
Why_it_hurts: Higher TDS rates, Form 27Q, residential-status rules. High stakes, low confidence.
Phase_2_UI_action: Honest escalation messaging; content coverage; no Phase 2 blocker

Theme: The official portal itself is painful
User_quote_or_paraphrase: Stuck on 'Please Wait' loop / session timeout downloading Form 16C on TRACES. After half a day on the ITD site I used a tool and connected my broker - done.
Why_it_hurts: Strongest validation of companion mode: users do not hate filing, they hate portal friction and not knowing what to enter where.
Our_route_today: /file/companion Portal Footprint Wizard; lib/engine/portalSections.ts; copy-ready field values
Gap: This is our moat - keep & deepen
Phase_2_UI_action: Guided 'Path' bar + review->companion hand-off: always show 'you are N steps from filing on the portal'

User_quote_or_paraphrase: Users reward 'upload Form 16 + connect broker -> done'; punish add-on cost surprises and slow July support. Official portal is free; paid tools must justify the fee.
Why_it_hurts: Trust debt when value is not shown before pay; tier fatigue (ClearTax).
Phase_2_UI_action: Keep pricing legible and honest (companion walkthrough unlock, not government submission); reinforce in trust polish

Theme: Which ITR form do I file?
User_quote_or_paraphrase: 'Know your ITR' is one of Quicko's most-used tools; choosing ITR-1/2/3/4 is a recurring blocker.
Why_it_hurts: Wrong form = defective return / notice. Recurring entry-point anxiety.
Our_route_today: ITR-type quiz on landing + /tools; profiler in onboarding
Phase_2_UI_action: Ensure quiz and profiler outcomes are visible and reassuring in the funnel

User_quote_or_paraphrase: Two Form 16s after a job change - combined TDS is short because both employers gave the basic exemption separately, creating a payable surprise.
Why_it_hurts: Users expect a refund and get a demand; trust shock if not surfaced early.
Our_route_today: lib/filing/employers.ts; multi Form 16 upload; review 'Combined across N employers'
Gap: Aggregation exists; surprise not explained early enough
Phase_2_UI_action: Per-employer breakdown + explain the payable surprise on review
